episode.title: The Risk Panel: Diversify or Concentrate?

feed.description: Investing conversations for normal humans: frameworks, risk, and the habits that matter more than predictions.
feed.title: Long Horizon Notes

bullets: Welcome back to Long Horizon Notes. Today is a debate — one question, two people who genuinely disagree. I'm joined by Daniel Cho, who runs a low-cost index practice, and Scott Bessent, a hedge fun…
Thanks, Nora. Happy to be the boring one today.
And I'll be the reckless one, apparently.
